OneLineDescription: Tweaks and compatibility fixes for Container and Leveled List loot records.
LongDescription: A collection of independently-toggleable tweaks and compatibility patches for Skyrim's Container and Leveled List loot records. Currently includes: bypassing 'Scarcity - Less Loot Mod' on boss containers and NPCs, stripping gold (and pure-gold Leveled Lists) out of Containers, and propagating the "Lock Related Loot" changes to the patch.
